svg.title: TechNova RAG + LangGraph HITL Architecture
svg.desc: Complete flow from PDF ingestion to LangGraph HITL interrupt and resume

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PDF ingestion work in the RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What is MD5 deduplication in the PDF ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How does text chunking work? What is chunk size?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model does TechNova RAG use?')

svg.text: ② LangGraph State Graph (StateGraph + MemorySaver checkpointer)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user query start the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the retrieval node do in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('What does the generation node do in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('How does the evaluation node decide confidence?')

svg.text: ③ Confidence Score Logic (ChromaDB L2 Distance — lower = better)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What queries get HIGH confidence score?')
sendPrompt('What queries get MEDIUM confidence score?')
sendPrompt('What queries get LOW confidence and trigger HITL?')
sendPrompt('How does the conditional router decide between HITL and end?')
sendPrompt('What happens when RAG answers with high confidence?')

svg.text: ④ Real HITL: LangGraph interrupt() + Command(resume=...) + MemorySaver

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LangGraph interrupt work in the HITL node?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit HITL panel show to the agent?')
sendPrompt('How does Command(resume) work with thread_id in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('What is the final output after HITL resolution?')

svg.text: ⑤ Sample Queries by Score Tier
